mapper.select: select * from fp_notification_channel where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by updated_at desc
select * from fp_notification_channel where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
select * from fp_notification_channel where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and channel_code = #{channelCode}
mapper.update: update fp_notification_channel set channel_code = #{channelCode}, channel_name = #{channelName}, channel_type = #{channelType}, endpoint = #{endpoint}, api_key = #{apiKey}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from fp_notification_channel where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
